302.name: fishy
302.desc: +1 Health and Mana Regeneration while wet.

303.name: bullhorn
303.desc: Adds +1 Knockback to your basic attack if it's melee.

309.name: antlers
309.desc: Adds +1 Bleed to your basic attack.

313.name: Ram horns
313.desc: Adds +1 Knockback to your basic attack if it's melee.

314.name: Deer horns
314.desc: Thorns 1. Your basic attack inflicts Bleed if it's melee.

315.name: Fly Ears
315.desc: 50% chance to spawn a Charmed Fly each turn. Start with Poison 1.

316.name: Bat Ears
316.desc: You can see hidden things. 5% dodge chance.

317.name: Bone Ears
317.desc: Whenever you down a unit, you have a 10% chance to reanimate that unit with 50% HP.

319.name: Pierced Ears
319.desc: Gain +1 Charge when you take damage.

321.name: Spring Ears
321.desc: Units that contact you get knocked back 1 tile.

323.name: Vamp Ears
323.desc: Gain 1 HP when your basic attack deals damage.

325.name: Tree Branch
325.desc: If you're wet, gain +1 Charge and +1 [img:shield] at the end of your turn.

326.name: Worm Ear
326.desc: 5% chance to spawn a Maggot familiar each turn.

327.name: Ant Antenna
327.desc: An extra food pickup will spawn in each battle.

328.name: Snake Ears
328.desc: 5% chance to Petrify on damage and when hit.

329.name: External Gills
329.desc: Your basic attack leaves water tiles.

330.name: Hook Ears
330.desc: Thorns 1. 10% chance to inflict Immobile on units that contact you.

334.name: Metal Detector
334.desc: Spawn 1-3 more coins/scrap around the map on random tiles at the start of each battle.

335.name: Docked Ears
335.desc: Start with Bleed 1 and a bonus attack.

336.name: Large Leaves
336.desc: You gain 3 mana at the end of your turn if you didn't use your movement action.

338.name: Frozen ears
338.desc: Your basic attack has a 15% chance to inflict Freeze.

342.name: Infested Ears
342.desc: 20% chance to spawn a Charmed Flea when damaged.

344.name: Kitten
344.desc: Spawn a Charmed Kitten familiar when you get downed.

345.name: Mouse Ears
345.desc: Units that contact or attack you have a 15% chance to get Charmed.

750.name: Jackrabbit Ears
750.desc: Your movement action is a jump.

753.name: Goat Horns
753.desc: +1 Knockback damage. Your basic attack has +1 Knockback.

754.name: Electric Ears
754.desc: Electric damage you deal is increased by 1.

755.name: Head Ferns
755.desc: Gain +1 Charge every time you cast a spell.

-2.name: no ears (completely missing part) //TODO: deaf (unaffected by musical abilities)
